info.title: EasySign CLI
info.description: A Simple .NET Tool for signing and verifying files.

hookCapture.patchTarget: ProcessExit-fallback (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: add
commands.description: Create new bundle or update an existing one

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description:
Bundle path or directory containing the bundle
if the bundle name is not specified, a default name will be used

arguments.name: files
arguments.description:
Files to add to the bundle, Must be inside the bundle root path
if not specified, all files in the bundle root path will be added

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description:
Bundle path or directory containing the bundle
if the bundle name is not specified, a default name will be used

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description:
Bundle path or directory containing the bundle
if the bundle name is not specified, a default name will be used

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description:
Bundle path or directory containing the bundle
if the bundle name is not specified, a default name will be used

arguments.name: key
arguments.description:
Key to set or get
if not specified, will list all keys

arguments.name: value
arguments.description:
Value to set
if not specified, will get the value of the key

commands.name: trust
commands.description: Manage trusted root CAs and intermediate CAs

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add trusted root CA or intermediate CA certificate

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the certificate file in PEM or DER format

commands.name: list
commands.description: List trusted root CA and intermediate CA certificates

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove trusted root CA or intermediate CA certificate
